requirement_topic.en: MERA Licensing and ESCOM Grid-Connection — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), Grid Parameters 230/400 V 50 Hz, and IEC 61727 / IEC 62116 Compliance
requirement_topic.zh: MERA许可证及ESCOM并网——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、电网参数230/400 V 50 Hz及IEC 61727 / IEC 62116合规
requirement_topic.zht: MERA許可證及ESCOM併網——防孤島（IEC 62116）、電網參數230/400 V 50 Hz及IEC 61727 / IEC 62116合規

summary.en: Malawi's energy sector is regulated by the Malawi Energy Regulatory Authority (MERA) under the Energy Regulation Act. Any entity generating, transmitting, distributing, or supplying electricity — including grid-tied solar PV projects — must hold the appropriate MERA licence. ESCOM (Electricity Supply Corporation of Malawi) is the principal distribution and supply utility; EGENCO handles generation assets. For grid-connected PV inverters, ESCOM's technical connection requirements reference IEC standards: IEC 62116 (anti-islanding) and IEC 61727 (characteristics of the utility interface for photovoltaic systems) are the applicable IEC benchmarks. Malawi's grid operates at 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz — aligned with IEC standard voltages (IEC 60038) but distinct from China's 220/380 V grid (GB/T 156). Inverter firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays must be validated against Malawi's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid, not China's 220/380 V defaults. Note: Malawi's grid suffers frequent load-shedding and voltage instability due to hydro dependency (Shire River); inverter ride-through and reconnection behaviour under abnormal grid conditions should be confirmed with ESCOM before commissioning.
summary.zh: 马拉维能源行业由马拉维能源监管局（MERA）根据《能源监管法》管理。任何从事发电、输电、配电或售电的实体——包括并网太阳能光伏项目——须持有相应的MERA许可证。ESCOM（马拉维电力供应公司）是主要配电和供电公用事业机构；EGENCO负责发电资产。对于并网光伏逆变器，ESCOM技术接入要求引用IEC标准：IEC 62116（防孤岛）和IEC 61727（光伏系统公共接口特性）是适用的IEC基准。马拉维电网运行参数为单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz——与IEC标准电压（IEC 60038）一致，但与中国220/380 V电网（GB/T 156）不同。逆变器固件保护阈值和重连延迟须针对马拉维230/400 V、50 Hz电网进行验证，而非中国220/380 V默认参数。注意：马拉维电网因对希雷河水电的依赖，频繁发生限电和电压不稳；应在调试前向ESCOM确认逆变器在异常电网条件下的穿越和重连行为。
summary.zht: 馬拉威能源行業由馬拉威能源監管局（MERA）根據《能源監管法》管理。任何從事發電、輸電、配電或售電的實體——包括併網太陽能光伏項目——須持有相應的MERA許可證。ESCOM（馬拉威電力供應公司）是主要配電和供電公用事業機構；EGENCO負責發電資產。對於併網光伏逆變器，ESCOM技術接入要求引用IEC標準：IEC 62116（防孤島）和IEC 61727（光伏系統公共接口特性）是適用的IEC基準。馬拉威電網運行參數為單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz——與IEC標準電壓（IEC 60038）一致，但與中國220/380 V電網（GB/T 156）不同。逆變器韌體保護閾值和重連延遲須針對馬拉威230/400 V、50 Hz電網進行驗證，而非中國220/380 V預設參數。注意：馬拉威電網因對希雷河水電的依賴，頻繁發生限電和電壓不穩；應在調試前向ESCOM確認逆變器在異常電網條件下的穿越和重連行為。

standards_or_laws: Energy Regulation Act (Malawi) — legal basis for MERA licensing of electricity activities
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 60038 — IEC standard voltages (Malawi: 230/400 V, 50 Hz)
MERA — Malawi Energy Regulatory Authority licensing requirements for electricity supply and generation

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004-2018 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), and domestic anti-islanding test results referenced to GB/T 19939 or GB/T 37408. These Chinese documents are based on Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V, 50 Hz under GB/T 156) and Chinese regulatory approvals. They do not constitute MERA licence evidence, do not satisfy ESCOM's IEC-referenced grid-connection requirements, and are not interchangeable with IEC 62116 anti-islanding test reports for Malawi project submissions.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004-2018（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）及参照GB/T 19939或GB/T 37408的国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国文件基于中国电网条件（依GB/T 156为220/380 V、50 Hz）和中国监管审批，不构成MERA许可证据，不满足ESCOM基于IEC的并网要求，不可与用于马拉维项目提交的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告互换。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004-2018（光伏並網逆變器技術規範）及參照GB/T 19939或GB/T 37408的國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國文件基於中國電網條件（依GB/T 156為220/380 V、50 Hz）和中國監管審批，不構成MERA許可證據，不滿足ESCOM基於IEC的併網要求，不可與用於馬拉威項目提交的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告互換。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages — China: 220/380 V, 50 Hz)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents and domestic anti-islanding results do not satisfy MERA licensing requirements or ESCOM grid-connection conditions in Malawi. Exporters and project developers must: (a) obtain MERA licence(s) for the applicable electricity activity; (b) provide IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (c) provide IEC 61727 interface characteristic evidence; (d) validate and document inverter firmware protection thresholds for Malawi's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not China's 220/380 V defaults; (e) account for Malawi grid instability in inverter ride-through and reconnection settings and confirm acceptability with ESCOM. Where donor or lender procurement rules apply (World Bank, MCC, AfDB), additional IEC type-test and quality requirements apply on top of MERA/ESCOM conditions.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件和国内防孤岛结果不满足马拉维MERA许可要求或ESCOM并网条件。出口商和项目开发商须：（a）取得适用电力活动的MERA许可证；（b）提供来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（c）提供IEC 61727接口特性证据；（d）针对马拉维230/400 V、50 Hz电网（而非中国220/380 V默认参数）验证并记录逆变器固件保护阈值；（e）在逆变器穿越和重连设定中考虑马拉维电网不稳定性，并向ESCOM确认可接受性。如适用捐助方或贷款方采购规则（世界银行、MCC、非洲开发银行），除MERA/ESCOM条件外，还须满足额外的IEC型式试验和质量要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件和國內防孤島結果不滿足馬拉威MERA許可要求或ESCOM併網條件。出口商和項目開發商須：（a）取得適用電力活動的MERA許可證；（b）提供來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（c）提供IEC 61727接口特性證據；（d）針對馬拉威230/400 V、50 Hz電網（而非中國220/380 V預設參數）驗證並記錄逆變器韌體保護閾值；（e）在逆變器穿越和重連設定中考慮馬拉威電網不穩定性，並向ESCOM確認可接受性。如適用捐助方或貸款方採購規則（世界銀行、MCC、非洲開發銀行），除MERA/ESCOM條件外，還須滿足額外的IEC型式試驗和質量要求。

mandatory_status.target: MERA licence mandatory for regulated electricity activities; ESCOM IEC-referenced grid-connection conditions mandatory for grid-tied PV; donor/lender IEC type-test requirements mandatory under applicable procurement rules
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements under Chinese law; not transferable to Malawi MERA/ESCOM acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Malawi's MERA licensing and ESCOM grid-connection conditions require IEC-based evidence (IEC 62116, IEC 61727) and firmware validated for 230/400 V, 50 Hz — none of which is covered by Chinese GB/T grid certificates. Obtain MERA licence(s), IEC anti-islanding and interface test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, and re-parameterise inverter firmware for Malawi's grid before commissioning. Verify current MERA licence categories, ESCOM technical connection requirements, and any donor-lender specifications directly with MERA, ESCOM, and the project owner before finalising the equipment package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马拉维MERA许可要求和ESCOM并网条件需要基于IEC的证据（IEC 62116、IEC 61727）及针对230/400 V、50 Hz验证的固件——上述均未被中国GB/T并网证书覆盖。应取得MERA许可证、来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC防孤岛和接口测试报告，并在调试前将逆变器固件重新参数化为马拉维电网参数。在最终确定设备包前，请直接向MERA、ESCOM和项目业主核实现行MERA许可类别、ESCOM技术接入要求及任何捐助方/贷款方规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬拉威MERA許可要求和ESCOM併網條件需要基於IEC的證據（IEC 62116、IEC 61727）及針對230/400 V、50 Hz驗證的韌體——上述均未被中國GB/T併網證書覆蓋。應取得MERA許可證、來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC防孤島和接口測試報告，並在調試前將逆變器韌體重新參數化為馬拉威電網參數。在最終確定設備包前，請直接向MERA、ESCOM和項目業主核實現行MERA許可類別、ESCOM技術接入要求及任何捐助方/貸款方規格。

requirement_topic.en: Off-Grid and Mini-Grid Solar — IEC TS 62257, VeraSol Quality Standards, and Donor/Lender Procurement Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 离网和微电网太阳能——IEC TS 62257、VeraSol质量标准及捐助方/贷款方采购要求
requirement_topic.zht: 離網和微電網太陽能——IEC TS 62257、VeraSol質量標準及捐助方/貸款方採購要求

summary.en: Malawi has one of the lowest electrification rates in sub-Saharan Africa (approximately 15–20% national electrification, substantially lower in rural areas). The government's National Energy Policy and Malawi's Rural Electrification Programme (MAREP) prioritise off-grid solar home systems (SHS) and mini-grids as the primary pathway to access for underserved communities. Donor and development-finance institutions — particularly the World Bank (NESAP programme), Millennium Challenge Corporation (MCC Compact), African Development Bank, and the EU — are major funders of Malawi PV projects. These institutions impose procurement and quality standards that typically require: (a) IEC TS 62257 (Recommendations for small renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification) as the applicable quality framework for mini-grid PV components; (b) VeraSol (formerly GOGLA / Lighting Africa) quality verification for solar home system components, including Lighting Global Quality Standards for solar lanterns and SHS kits; (c) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence; (d) IEC 62116 anti-islanding for any grid-interactive inverter component. Supply of SHS or mini-grid inverters/charge controllers to donor-funded Malawi programmes without VeraSol/Lighting Global certification and IEC TS 62257-compliant documentation risks disqualification from procurement.
summary.zh: 马拉维是撒哈拉以南非洲电气化率最低的国家之一（全国电气化率约为15–20%，农村地区更低）。政府的《国家能源政策》和马拉维农村电气化计划（MAREP）将离网太阳能家用系统（SHS）和微电网作为未服务社区用电的主要途径。捐助方和发展融资机构——尤其是世界银行（NESAP计划）、千年挑战公司（MCC契约）、非洲开发银行和欧盟——是马拉维光伏项目的主要资助方。这些机构的采购和质量标准通常要求：（a）IEC TS 62257（农村电气化小型可再生能源和混合系统建议标准）作为微电网光伏部件的适用质量框架；（b）VeraSol（前身为GOGLA / Lighting Africa）对太阳能家用系统部件的质量验证，包括Lighting Global太阳能灯具和SHS套件质量标准；（c）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（d）任何并网互动逆变器部件的IEC 62116防孤岛。向捐助资助的马拉维项目供应不具备VeraSol/Lighting Global认证和IEC TS 62257合规文件的SHS或微电网逆变器/充电控制器，存在被取消采购资格的风险。
summary.zht: 馬拉威是撒哈拉以南非洲電氣化率最低的國家之一（全國電氣化率約為15–20%，農村地區更低）。政府的《國家能源政策》和馬拉威農村電氣化計畫（MAREP）將離網太陽能家用系統（SHS）和微電網作為未服務社區用電的主要途徑。捐助方和發展融資機構——尤其是世界銀行（NESAP計畫）、千年挑戰公司（MCC契約）、非洲開發銀行和歐盟——是馬拉威光伏項目的主要資助方。這些機構的採購和質量標準通常要求：（a）IEC TS 62257（農村電氣化小型可再生能源和混合系統建議標準）作為微電網光伏部件的適用質量框架；（b）VeraSol（前身為GOGLA / Lighting Africa）對太陽能家用系統部件的質量驗證，包括Lighting Global太陽能燈具和SHS套件質量標準；（c）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（d）任何併網互動逆變器部件的IEC 62116防孤島。向捐助資助的馬拉威項目供應不具備VeraSol/Lighting Global認證和IEC TS 62257合規文件的SHS或微電網逆變器/充電控制器，存在被取消採購資格的風險。

standards_or_laws: IEC TS 62257 — Recommendations for small renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification (series, multiple parts)
VeraSol (formerly GOGLA / Lighting Africa) Quality Verification — quality standards for solar home systems and components
Lighting Global Quality Standards — solar lanterns, SHS kits (World Bank Group programme)
IEC 62109-1/-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems
IEC 62116 — Anti-islanding test procedure for utility-interconnected PV inverters
World Bank NESAP (National Energy Sector Assistance Programme) — Malawi, procurement conditions
Millennium Challenge Corporation (MCC) Malawi Compact — procurement and quality standards

summary.en: China does not have a domestic programme or standard equivalent to IEC TS 62257 or the VeraSol/Lighting Global quality verification framework for off-grid solar home systems. Chinese off-grid PV inverters and charge controllers are typically assessed under GB/T 37408 (grid-connected inverters) or manufacturer-level internal standards; China's rural electrification programmes are not donor-financed using IEC TS 62257 or VeraSol procurement conditions. Chinese domestic off-grid PV certificates do not satisfy VeraSol quality verification requirements or donor-lender procurement conditions for Malawi programmes. Some Chinese manufacturers have voluntarily obtained VeraSol or Lighting Global certification for export products — this is product-specific and must be verified by model.
summary.zh: 中国没有与IEC TS 62257或离网太阳能家用系统VeraSol/Lighting Global质量验证框架等效的国内计划或标准。中国离网光伏逆变器和充电控制器通常依据GB/T 37408（并网逆变器）或制造商内部标准进行评估；中国农村电气化项目不使用IEC TS 62257或VeraSol采购条件的捐助资金。中国国内离网光伏证书不满足VeraSol质量验证要求或马拉维计划的捐助方/贷款方采购条件。部分中国制造商已自愿为出口产品取得VeraSol或Lighting Global认证——这是基于具体产品的，须按型号核实。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與IEC TS 62257或離網太陽能家用系統VeraSol/Lighting Global質量驗證框架等效的國內計畫或標準。中國離網光伏逆變器和充電控制器通常依據GB/T 37408（併網逆變器）或製造商內部標準進行評估；中國農村電氣化項目不使用IEC TS 62257或VeraSol採購條件的捐助資金。中國國內離網光伏證書不滿足VeraSol質量驗證要求或馬拉威計畫的捐助方/貸款方採購條件。部分中國製造商已自願為出口產品取得VeraSol或Lighting Global認證——這是基於具體產品的，須按型號核實。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic off-grid PV certificates do not satisfy VeraSol, Lighting Global, or IEC TS 62257 requirements applicable to donor-funded Malawi off-grid and mini-grid solar projects. For off-grid and mini-grid inverters and charge controllers supplied to donor-financed Malawi programmes, exporters must confirm whether the specific product model holds VeraSol quality verification and IEC TS 62257-applicable test evidence. For utility-scale or hybrid mini-grid inverters, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test and IEC 62116 anti-islanding certificates from ILAC-accredited laboratories are required. Confirm the applicable donor or lender procurement rules (World Bank Standard Procurement Documents, MCC procurement conditions, AfDB procurement framework) with the project owner before committing equipment to a specific programme.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内离网光伏证书不满足捐助资助的马拉维离网和微电网太阳能项目适用的VeraSol、Lighting Global或IEC TS 62257要求。对于供应至捐助资助马拉维项目的离网和微电网逆变器及充电控制器，出口商须确认特定产品型号是否持有VeraSol质量验证和IEC TS 62257适用测试证据。对于公用事业规模或混合微电网逆变器，须提供来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验和IEC 62116防孤岛证书。在将设备用于特定计划前，请与项目业主确认适用的捐助方或贷款方采购规则（世界银行标准采购文件、MCC采购条件、非洲开发银行采购框架）。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內離網光伏證書不滿足捐助資助的馬拉威離網和微電網太陽能項目適用的VeraSol、Lighting Global或IEC TS 62257要求。對於供應至捐助資助馬拉威項目的離網和微電網逆變器及充電控制器，出口商須確認特定產品型號是否持有VeraSol質量驗證和IEC TS 62257適用測試證據。對於公用事業規模或混合微電網逆變器，須提供來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗和IEC 62116防孤島證書。在將設備用於特定計畫前，請與項目業主確認適用的捐助方或貸款方採購規則（世界銀行標準採購文件、MCC採購條件、非洲開發銀行採購框架）。

mandatory_status.target: VeraSol/Lighting Global quality verification mandatory under donor and lender procurement conditions for off-grid SHS and mini-grid programmes; IEC TS 62257 framework applicable to donor-funded rural electrification; IEC 62109-1/-2 and IEC 62116 mandatory for grid-interactive components under donor procurement specifications
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent mandatory off-grid quality verification scheme exists in China for domestic market; some Chinese manufacturers hold voluntary VeraSol certification for export models

source.publisher: VeraSol (Formerly GOGLA / Lighting Africa — World Bank Group)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese domestic off-grid PV certificates do not satisfy VeraSol, Lighting Global, or IEC TS 62257 requirements for donor-financed Malawi solar programmes. Confirm whether the specific inverter or charge controller model holds current VeraSol quality verification before committing it to a donor-funded Malawi off-grid or mini-grid project. For utility-scale or hybrid mini-grid inverters, obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 and IEC 62116 certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Verify the specific World Bank, MCC, or AfDB procurement conditions for each programme directly with the project owner — procurement rules vary by programme and financing institution.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国国内离网光伏证书不满足捐助资助马拉维太阳能计划的VeraSol、Lighting Global或IEC TS 62257要求。在将特定逆变器或充电控制器型号用于捐助资助的马拉维离网或微电网项目前，请确认其是否持有当前VeraSol质量验证。对于公用事业规模或混合微电网逆变器，须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62109-1/-2和IEC 62116证书。请直接向项目业主核实每个计划的具体世界银行、MCC或非洲开发银行采购条件——采购规则因计划和融资机构而异。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國國內離網光伏證書不滿足捐助資助馬拉威太陽能計畫的VeraSol、Lighting Global或IEC TS 62257要求。在將特定逆變器或充電控制器型號用於捐助資助的馬拉威離網或微電網項目前，請確認其是否持有當前VeraSol質量驗證。對於公用事業規模或混合微電網逆變器，須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62109-1/-2和IEC 62116證書。請直接向項目業主核實每個計畫的具體世界銀行、MCC或非洲開發銀行採購條件——採購規則因計畫和融資機構而異。
